Example_EN: We had a lot of fun at the beach last weekend.
Example_CN: 上周末我们在海滩玩得很开心。

Example_EN: Wear a helmet to protect your head while cycling.
Example_CN: 骑自行车时请戴头盔保护头部。

Example_EN: Water is a precious resource in dry regions.
Example_CN: 在干旱地区水是宝贵资源。
MemoryTip: re + source：可一再取用的来源。

Example_EN: She decided to study science at university.
Example_CN: 她决定在大学学习科学。

Example_EN: Clean water helps prevent the spread of disease.
Example_CN: 清洁水源有助于防止疾病传播。

Example_EN: A healthy diet needs a balance of different foods.
Example_CN: 健康饮食需要各类食物的平衡。

Example_EN: Heavy rain can damage crops in the open fields.
Example_CN: 大雨可能损坏露天田地里的庄稼。

Collocation: on the basis of;on a daily basis;solid basis
Example_EN: We made the decision on the basis of the survey.
Example_CN: 我们根据调查结果做了决定。

Example_EN: Who is the author of this popular children's book?
Example_CN: 这本畅销童书的作者是谁？

Example_EN: Everyone should learn some basic first-aid skills.
Example_CN: 每个人都应该学习一些基本急救技能。

Example_EN: Teachers should encourage students to ask questions.
Example_CN: 老师应鼓励学生提问。

Example_EN: She decided to cut her hair shorter for summer.
Example_CN: 她决定夏天把头发剪短一些。

Example_EN: The study included both male and female adults.
Example_CN: 这项研究包含成年男性和女性。
MemoryTip: male：生物学意义上的雄性/男性。

Example_EN: Only trained staff may operate this heavy machine.
Example_CN: 只有受训员工可以操作这台重型机器。

Example_EN: Please reflect on what you learned from the trip.
Example_CN: 请反思你从这次旅行中学到了什么。

Example_EN: I try to exercise for thirty minutes every day.
Example_CN: 我尽量每天锻炼三十分钟。
MemoryTip: ex + ercise：把身体/权利拿出来用。

Example_EN: This map is useful for visitors new to the city.
Example_CN: 这张地图对新来这座城市的游客很有用。

Example_EN: We booked a table at a small Italian restaurant.
Example_CN: 我们在一家小型意大利餐馆订了桌。

Example_EN: Her monthly income covers rent and food costs.
Example_CN: 她的月收入够支付房租和食费。

Example_EN: Private property should not be entered without permission.
Example_CN: 未经许可不应进入私有财产。

Example_EN: Do you have any previous experience with this software?
Example_CN: 你以前有使用这款软件的经验吗？
MemoryTip: pre + vious：走在前面已经发生过。

Example_EN: It gets dark early in winter in this region.
Example_CN: 这个地区冬天黑得早。

Example_EN: Can you imagine living without a mobile phone?
Example_CN: 你能想象没有手机的生活吗？

Example_EN: It is okay if you need a few more minutes.
Example_CN: 如果你还需要几分钟，没问题。

Example_EN: She works evenings to earn extra money for travel.
Example_CN: 她晚上打工挣旅行的额外费用。

Example_EN: Their daughter starts secondary school this autumn.
Example_CN: 他们的女儿今年秋天开始上中学。

Example_EN: Please post this letter before Friday afternoon.
Example_CN: 请在周五下午前把这封信寄出。

Example_EN: He still reads the newspaper with breakfast every day.
Example_CN: 他每天早餐时仍读报纸。

Collocation: define as;define a problem;hard to define
Example_EN: Can you define the word in one clear sentence?
Example_CN: 你能用一句清楚的话定义这个词吗？
MemoryTip: de + fine：划清边界说清是什么。

Collocation: draw a conclusion;in conclusion;jump to conclusions
Example_EN: In conclusion, we need more practice before the test.
Example_CN: 总之，考试前我们需要更多练习。
MemoryTip: conclude 的名词：收束到的判断。

Example_EN: The wall clock stopped during the power cut.
Example_CN: 停电时墙上的钟停了。

Example_EN: Everybody liked the homemade cake at the party.
Example_CN: 聚会上每个人都喜欢自制蛋糕。

Example_EN: We often visit our grandparents at the weekend.
Example_CN: 我们常在周末探望祖父母。

Collocation: perform well;perform a song;perform a task
Example_EN: The band will perform three new songs tonight.
Example_CN: 乐队今晚将演奏三首新歌。
MemoryTip: per + form：按规定形式做出来。

Example_EN: You should get professional advice on legal matters.
Example_CN: 法律事务上你应该征求专业建议。

Example_EN: Is this blue scarf yours or mine?
Example_CN: 这条蓝围巾是你的还是我的？

Example_EN: The class held a lively debate about school uniforms.
Example_CN: 全班就校服问题进行了热烈辩论。

Example_EN: This photo brings back a happy childhood memory.
Example_CN: 这张照片唤起一段快乐的童年记忆。

Example_EN: The city plans to create more green spaces downtown.
Example_CN: 该市计划在市中心开辟更多绿地。

Example_EN: That song always makes me think of last summer.
Example_CN: 那首歌总让我想起去年夏天。

Example_EN: Do you object to opening the window a little?
Example_CN: 你反对把窗户开一点点吗？
MemoryTip: object：摆在眼前的物，或提出异议。

Example_EN: It takes effort to maintain a healthy daily routine.
Example_CN: 保持健康的日常作息需要努力。

Example_EN: Please give credit to everyone who helped the project.
Example_CN: 请把功劳归给帮助过项目的每一个人。

Collocation: wedding ring;ring the bell;give a ring
Example_EN: Please ring the bell if nobody answers the door.
Example_CN: 如果没人应门，请按门铃。

Example_EN: Scientists recently discovered a new kind of butterfly.
Example_CN: 科学家最近发现了一种新蝴蝶。

Example_EN: The street was dead quiet after midnight.
Example_CN: 午夜后街上死一般安静。

Example_EN: Shall we meet tomorrow afternoon at three?
Example_CN: 我们明天下午三点见面好吗？

Collocation: prefer to;prefer A to B;would prefer
Example_EN: I prefer tea to coffee in the morning.
Example_CN: 早上我更喜欢喝茶而不是咖啡。
MemoryTip: pre + fer：心里把某样往前放。

Collocation: extend a deadline;extend an invitation;extend to
Example_EN: Could you extend the deadline by two more days?
Example_CN: 你能把截止日期再延长两天吗？

Example_EN: There is a real possibility of rain this evening.
Example_CN: 今晚确实有可能下雨。
MemoryTip: possible + ity：可能成为事实的程度。

Collocation: in the direction of;directions to;change direction
Example_EN: We asked for directions to the nearest station.
Example_CN: 我们询问了去最近车站的路线。

Example_EN: The new sports facility is open to local people.
Example_CN: 新的体育设施对当地居民开放。
MemoryTip: facil + ity：让做事更容易的场所。

Example_EN: The market sells a wide variety of fresh fruits.
Example_CN: 市场出售各种各样的新鲜水果。

Example_EN: Walking is part of her daily routine now.
Example_CN: 散步现已成为她日常作息的一部分。

Example_EN: Pack warm clothes if you travel to the mountains.
Example_CN: 如果去山里旅行，请带上保暖衣服。

Example_EN: Staring at a screen for hours can hurt your eyes.
Example_CN: 盯着屏幕数小时会伤眼睛。

Example_EN: Please keep track of your spending this month.
Example_CN: 请记录你这个月的花销。

Example_EN: Children love to dance when music starts playing.
Example_CN: 音乐响起时孩子们喜欢跳舞。

Example_EN: I completely forgot about the meeting this morning.
Example_CN: 我今早完全忘了开会的事。

Example_EN: The female athlete set a new school record today.
Example_CN: 这名女运动员今天创造了新的校记录。
MemoryTip: female：生物学意义上的雌性/女性。

Example_EN: Taking care of a pet is a big responsibility.
Example_CN: 照料宠物是一项重大责任。
MemoryTip: responsible 的名词：该担起的担子。

Example_EN: Is this painting an original or a copy?
Example_CN: 这幅画是原作还是复制品？

Example_EN: My sister works as a designer in another city.
Example_CN: 我姐姐在另一座城市做设计师。

Collocation: rock music;hard as a rock;rock the boat
Example_EN: Children collected small rocks by the riverbank.
Example_CN: 孩子们在河岸边捡小石头。

Example_EN: Her childhood dream was to become a pilot.
Example_CN: 她的童年梦想是成为飞行员。
MemoryTip: dream：夜里的幻象，白天的志向。

Example_EN: He neither called nor sent a message yesterday.
Example_CN: 他昨天既没打电话，也没发消息。
MemoryTip: nor：和 neither 搭配否定两边。

Example_EN: She hopes to study medicine at university.
Example_CN: 她希望在大学学医。

Example_EN: Children can easily learn songs by listening often.
Example_CN: 孩子们经常听就能轻松学会歌曲。

Example_EN: We booked the tour through a local travel agency.
Example_CN: 我们通过当地旅行社预订了行程。
MemoryTip: agent + cy：代理人办事的机构。

Example_EN: The book costs about ten dollars in the shop.
Example_CN: 这本书在店里大约要十美元。

Example_EN: They grow tomatoes in their small back garden.
Example_CN: 他们在自家小后院种西红柿。

Collocation: fix a problem;quick fix;fix the date
Example_EN: Can you fix the broken chair this weekend?
Example_CN: 你这周末能修好那把坏椅子吗？

Example_EN: Please plan ahead if you want cheaper tickets.
Example_CN: 如果想买更便宜的票，请提前计划。

Example_EN: Look both ways before you cross the busy road.
Example_CN: 穿过繁忙马路前先左右看。
MemoryTip: cross：两条线相交，或横穿过去。

Example_EN: Yeah, I can help you move the boxes later.
Example_CN: 好啊，我稍后可以帮你搬箱子。

Example_EN: He wants to lose a little weight before summer.
Example_CN: 他想在夏天前减轻一点体重。

Example_EN: You should get legal advice before signing the form.
Example_CN: 签字前你应该寻求法律建议。
MemoryTip: leg + al：与法律相关、被允许。

Example_EN: The committee accepted our proposal for longer breaks.
Example_CN: 委员会接受了我们延长休息时间的提议。
MemoryTip: propose 的名词：摆到桌上的方案。

Example_EN: Please download the latest version of the app.
Example_CN: 请下载应用程序的最新版本。

Collocation: have a conversation;private conversation;start a conversation
Example_EN: We had a long conversation about weekend plans.
Example_CN: 我们就周末计划聊了很久。

Example_EN: Somebody left a notebook on the classroom desk.
Example_CN: 有人把笔记本落在教室课桌上了。
MemoryTip: some + body：某一个不确定的人。

Collocation: British pound;a pound of;pound on the door
Example_EN: The ticket costs about twenty pounds each.
Example_CN: 门票每人大约二十英镑。
MemoryTip: pound：英国货币，也指重量单位。

Example_EN: She buys a cooking magazine at the station kiosk.
Example_CN: 她在车站报亭买烹饪杂志。

Example_EN: Please cut the paper into a heart shape.
Example_CN: 请把纸裁成心形。

Example_EN: We spent a quiet week by the sea last August.
Example_CN: 去年八月我们在海边安静地过了一周。

Example_EN: Please call me immediately if anything goes wrong.
Example_CN: 如果出了任何问题请立刻给我打电话。
MemoryTip: immediate + ly：中间没有任何耽搁。

Example_EN: Welcome to our school open day this morning.
Example_CN: 欢迎参加我们今天上午的学校开放日。

Example_EN: She gave a warm smile when we entered the room.
Example_CN: 我们进屋时她露出温暖的微笑。

Example_EN: Good communication skills help teams work better.
Example_CN: 良好的沟通技能有助于团队更好协作。
MemoryTip: communicate 的名词：信息来回传递。

Example_EN: Ask a travel agent about cheaper flight options.
Example_CN: 向旅行社代理询问更便宜的航班选项。

Example_EN: They served traditional food during the local festival.
Example_CN: 当地节日期间他们供应传统食物。

Example_EN: We need to replace the old batteries in the remote.
Example_CN: 我们需要更换遥控器里的旧电池。
MemoryTip: re + place：放到原来的位置换新。

Example_EN: Try not to judge people by their clothes alone.
Example_CN: 尽量不要单凭衣着评判别人。
MemoryTip: judge：拿起法槌或心里下判断。

Example_EN: She painted the whole room by herself last weekend.
Example_CN: 她上周末独自粉刷了整个房间。

Collocation: suddenly realise;all of a sudden;die suddenly
Example_EN: The lights suddenly went out during the storm.
Example_CN: 暴风雨中灯突然灭了。

Example_EN: Each generation faces different technology challenges.
Example_CN: 每一代人都面临不同的技术挑战。
MemoryTip: generate 的名词：一批人同时成长。

Example_EN: I estimate that the walk will take twenty minutes.
Example_CN: 我估计步行大约需要二十分钟。

Chinese: 最喜爱的；宠儿（美式拼写）
Example_EN: Blue is still my favorite colour after all these years.
Example_CN: 这么多年过去，蓝色仍是我最爱的颜色。
MemoryTip: favour + ite：偏爱的那个；拼写保留美式。

Example_EN: Some students have difficulty waking up early.
Example_CN: 有些学生很难早起。
MemoryTip: difficult 的名词：难关横在前面。

Example_EN: Please keep the receipt after every purchase.
Example_CN: 每次购物后请保留收据。
